docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DARIN FOSTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-03-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY DARIN FOSTER, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GIN KWAN. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-03-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-08-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDERICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT AND REPRESENTED BY DARIN FOSTER. DEFENDANT GIN KWAN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IS DARIN FOSTER. DEFENDANT GIN KWAN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-05-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GIN KWAN IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
